summary: YouTube now allows users to completely remove Shorts videos from the app, a feature added in 2020. This option is part of the Shorts Feed Limit feature which was first introduced last year.

title: ChatGPT, Gemini and Grok confidently generate dangerous medical advice half the time, study finds
summary: A study in BMJ Open reveals that around 50% of medical advice from popular AI chatbots is inaccurate. The research tested five platforms and found significant issues with open-ended queries.

title: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman seeks dismissal of sister's punitive damages claims in sexual abuse lawsuit

title: Wipro bags Alpha Net client contracts in $71-million deal
summary: The acquisition will give Wipro access to a set of key clients, customer contracts and related employees from Alpha Net Group. The deal also includes deferred earnout-linked payments tied to performance conditions and is expected to close by June 30, 2026.

title: Ola's AI smart assistant 'Kruti' goes dark across app platforms
